---
title: "Doctor Visit Data"
author: "Cameron & Trivedi"
date: "5/20/2026"
date-modified: "5/23/2026"
categories: [Bootstrap-Simulation]
---

## Source

This is Doctor visit data from Cameron & Trivedi Microeconometrics Using Stata, Second Edition 
using data from the 2002 Medical Expenditure Panel Survey age 24-65, private sector not self-employed, excludes public insurance Medicare/Medicaid

## Dataset

[mus10data.dta](../../data/mus10data.dta)

or use directly in code

```stata
use https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tphofer/ncsp-hhcr/refs/heads/main/data/mus10data.dta
```

## Dataset description 

### Features

count, healthcare utilization, longitudinal

### Variables

```text
. codebook,compact

Variable     Obs Unique      Mean      Min      Max  Label
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
educ       30124     18  12.72431        0       17  Years of schooling
docvis     30124    106  3.818251        0      160  number of doctor visits
age        30124     40  4.074266      2.5      6.4  Age in years / 10
income     30124  15739  31.89734  -49.999  280.777  Income in $ / 1000
female     30124      2  .4722148        0        1  = 1 if female
black      30124      2  .1134643        0        1  = 1 if black
hispanic   30124      2  .2142146        0        1  = 1 if hispanic
married    30124      2  .6580135        0        1  = 1 if married
noreast    30124      2  .1686695        0        1  = 1 if Northeast
midwest    30124      2  .2203227        0        1  = 1 if Midwest
south      30124      2  .3694065        0        1  = 1 if South
msa        30124      2  .8105165        0        1  = 1 if metropolitan statistical area
firmsize   30124    236  14.61772        0       50  Size of firm/100
vegood     30124      2  .3470987        0        1  = 1 if very good health
good       30124      2  .2824658        0        1  = 1 if good health
physlim    30124      2  .1548931        0        1  = 1 if physical limitation
fairpoor   30124      2  .0890984        0        1  = 1 if fair or poor health
age2       30124     40  17.61898     6.25    40.96  = age x age
year97     30124      2   .110875        0        1  = 1 if year 1997
year98     30124      2  .1040698        0        1  = 1 if year 1998
year99     30124      2  .1307595        0        1  = 1 if year 1999
year00     30124      2  .1035055        0        1  = 1 if year 2000
year01     30124      2  .2052848        0        1  = 1 if year 2001
year02     30124      2  .1464613        0        1  = 1 if year 2003
famsize    30124     15  3.157881        1       17  Family size
injury     30124      2  .2018988        0        1  = 1 if an injury
private    30124      2  .8197119        0        1  = 1 if private insurance
chronic    30124      2  .3364427        0        1  = 1 if a chronic condition
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

```
